observationFocus: Focus on the board state, tile positions, empty spaces, merges, and whether a move changed the board.
When legible, explicitly describe which rows or columns contain tiles, which values are adjacent, and whether a merge or a newly spawned tile appeared after the move.
If the post-move board is still visually ambiguous, say that the board changed but the exact tile layout is still resolving.
Ignore cinematic interpretation and describe the puzzle state directly.
notes: Keep the highest tile anchored in one corner when possible.
Treat each semantic action as a single board shift.
Dynamic/random board updates should be handled one move at a time with a fresh observation after every move.
